creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Chris,
ports-mgmt/tinderbox at version 4.2 since Aug 2014
ports-mgmt/tinderbox-devel is at version 4.0.0.b2 for 3 years (Jan 2013)

Normally when -devel is older than stable it's at least marked IGNORE to avoid confusion.  Since this -devel is stagnant for 3 years, I'd say it's a candidate for removal (especially since stable is also stagnant).

What do you think?
